questions.question: Which symbol correctly compares 458 and 485?
questions.explanation: Since 458 and 485 have the same hundreds digit, we compare the tens place: 5 < 8, so $458 < 485$.

questions.question: The symbol < means "is greater than".
questions.explanation: The symbol < means "is less than". The symbol > means "is greater than".

questions.question: Which number is the smallest among 234, 243, 324, and 342?
questions.explanation: Comparing the hundreds places: 2 < 3, so 234 and 243 are smaller. Between 234 and 243, the tens place: 3 < 4, so 234 is smallest.
